title: WAF SQL Injection Attack Blocked
description: Detects SQL injection attempts blocked by OCI WAF. Indicates active exploitation of OWASP A03:2021 Injection vulnerabilities against the web application.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI WAF Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC WAF Security Logs') and (('Action' = 'BLOCK') and (('Request URL' like '*UNION SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*union select*' or 'Request URL' like '*UNION%20SELECT*' or 'Request URL' like '*DROP TABLE*' or 'Request URL' like '*drop table*' or 'Request URL' like '*ORDER BY 1*' or 'Request URL' like '*order by 1*' or 'Request URL' like '*INFORMATION_SCHEMA*' or 'Request URL' like '*information_schema*' or 'Request URL' like '*WAITFOR DELAY*' or 'Request URL' like '*BENCHMARK(*' or 'Request URL' like '*SLEEP(*' or 'Request URL' like '*EXTRACTVALUE(*' or 'Request URL' like '*UPDATEXML(*')))
falsepositives: Legitimate queries containing SQL keywords in search fields
Security scanning tools during authorized testing
